data.title: Ambipar Emergency Response Announces Board Resignation
data.description:
An announcement from Ambipar Emergency Response ( (AMBI) ) is now available.

On October 23, 2025, Ambipar Emergency Response announced the resignation of Ms. Mariana Loyola Ferreira Sgarbi from its Board of Directors. The company is currently evaluating the appointment of an independent director to fill the vacancy. This change in the board may impact the company’s governance structure, potentially influencing its strategic direction and stakeholder relations.

More about Ambipar Emergency Response

Ambipar Emergency Response specializes in environmental services, operating in six main business units: emergency response, fire response, marine response, medical response, industrial response, and environmental response. The company is present in 41 countries across all six continents, providing standardized services globally. Founded in 1995 by Tércio Borlenghi Jr., Ambipar Response has established a significant presence in the environmental services industry.

data.title: BGIN Blockchain Ltd. Completes $30 Million IPO on Nasdaq
data.description:
Bgin Blockchain Ltd. Class A ( (BGIN) ) has shared an announcement.

On October 22, 2025, BGIN Blockchain Limited successfully closed its initial public offering (IPO) of 5,000,000 Class A ordinary shares at $6.00 per share, raising approximately $30 million before expenses. The shares began trading on the Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol ‘BGIN’ on October 21, 2025. The company plans to use the proceeds to expand its mining operations and develop new proprietary chips. This IPO marks a significant milestone for BGIN, enhancing its market presence and financial capacity to pursue strategic growth initiatives.

More about Bgin Blockchain Ltd. Class A

BGIN Blockchain Limited is a digital asset technology company specializing in proprietary cryptocurrency-mining technologies. The company focuses on altcoins and aims to make crypto mining accessible to all by developing innovative products for various market needs, from beginners to large-scale industrial miners. BGIN designs and manufactures mining machines under its ICERIVER brand, providing operational flexibility through advanced mining infrastructure and hosting services.

data.title: Ambipar Emergency Response Faces NYSE Delisting Amid Bankruptcy Filing
data.description:
An announcement from Ambipar Emergency Response ( (AMBI) ) is now available.

On October 23, 2025, Ambipar Emergency Response announced that the NYSE American has initiated delisting proceedings for the company’s Ordinary Shares and Warrants. This action follows Ambipar’s disclosure of filing for Chapter 11 bankruptcy on October 21, 2025. While the delisting proceedings are underway, the company’s business operations and reporting obligations remain unaffected. The decision reflects the company’s current financial challenges and could impact its market presence and stakeholder confidence.

More about Ambipar Emergency Response

Ambipar Emergency Response is a company specializing in environmental services, operating across six main business units: emergency response, fire response, marine response, medical response, industrial response, and environmental response. The company has a global presence in 41 countries across all six continents, providing standardized services worldwide. Founded in 1995 by Tércio Borlenghi Jr., Ambipar is headquartered in São Paulo, Brazil.
